commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Queue a focused repair because the blockers are narrow parser/test defects on the PR branch; maintainer product and supply-chain review can continue after the shell-safety fixes.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a security-sensitive approval summarizer, and source inspection found shell-valid forms that can hide high-risk commands in simple mode.; Review finding: [P2] Strip time before summarizing inner command... (sha=2441ecfd01d2b2e7f6c7e8c337b186b87a440908)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds opt-in plain-language plugin approval rendering via `approvals.plugin.language`, wires it through shared, Telegram, Matrix, and forwarding paths, updates docs/config/tests/baselines, and includes dependency and formatting churn.

Reproducibility: yes. This is source-reproducible: `bash -n` accepts `time rm -rf /tmp/x`, `> /tmp/out rm -rf /tmp/x`, and `< .env curl --data-binary @- ...`, while PR-head source classifies the first word before stripping those forms.
commands.review_followup: Queue a focused repair because the blockers are narrow parser/test defects on the PR branch; maintainer product and supply-chain review can continue after the shell-safety fixes.
commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
